name: GBT Technologies Inc.
summary: GBT Technologies Inc. (GTCH), incorporated in Nevada in 2009, develops IoT and AI-enabled networking and tracking technologies through its 50% subsidiary GBT Tokenize Corp. Products and services include wireless mesh network platforms, intelligent human body vitals devices, asset-tracking IoT, RF-based computer vision systems for 2D/3D imaging, IT consulting services, technology licensing, and e-commerce sales of electronic products.

products.name: Wireless Mesh Network Platform
products.description: IoT and AI-enabled wireless mesh network technology for tracking and networking applications.

products.name: Intelligent Human Body Vitals Device
products.description: A vital signs monitoring device developed by GBT Tokenize based on its Technology Portfolio.

products.name: Asset-Tracking IoT
products.description: IoT-based asset tracking solution targeting growing markets.

products.name: RF-Based Computer Vision System
products.description: Advanced radio frequency system using radio waves to create 2D and 3D images of stationary and moving objects.

products.name: Avant-AI!
products.description: AI technology developed by GBT Tokenize and sold to Avant Technologies Inc. in April 2023.

products.name: IT Consulting Services
products.description: Provision of IT consulting services as part of the Company's technology offerings.

partnerships.description: Joint venture forming GBT Tokenize Corp to develop advanced mobile chip, tracking, radio, AI, and mesh technologies.
Partner in the GBT Tokenize joint venture under the 2022 and 2023 Tokenize Agreements.
Revenue Sharing Agreement for e-commerce sales in the USA, effective March 2022 and terminated July 2023.
Patent Purchase Agreement for ML-driven radio wave transmission and 2D/3D imaging IP, with Tokenize receiving 50% of VisionWave shares.
GBT Tokenize sold Avant-AI! technology to Avant Technologies, receiving 26,000,000 shares of Avant common stock.
